STM32_Communication
  • Installation
  • View page source

Installation

Prerequisites

  • Python 3.8.10 or higher

  • pip package manager

Installation Steps

  1. Install the required dependency:

pip install pyserial

  1. Copy the communication.py module to your project directory.

  2. Import the module in your Python code:

from communication import STM32

Verifying Installation

Run the following test to verify everything works:

from communication import STM32

# Test CRC calculation (should output 0x4B37)
crc = STM32.crc16_compute(b'123456789')
print(f"CRC: 0x{crc:04X}")
